summary: Large TyFigupon decomp/matching PR centered on src/melee/ty/tyfigupon.c, with supporting type/header/symbol updates. Evidence shows many previously stubbed tyfigupon functions implemented, several signatures recovered, ToyAnimState converted from raw byte storage to a typed shared struct, and four tyfigupon data symbols changed from global to local scope. Automated bot output reported +1804 matched code bytes and 10 new matches, including tyfigupon functions; no human review comments were present.

key_files.role: Primary implementation file; adds many TyFigupon function bodies, local structs, asset/string data, includes, camera descriptor, matching pragmas/PAD_STACK, and matching-oriented cleanup.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/ty/tyfigupon.c +1360/-56
diff_excerpt: tyfigupon.c replaces stubs for fn_803152BC, un_803153EC, fn_803155C8 and others
text_corpus: bot report lists tyfigupon new matches and improvements

key_files.role: Recovered prototypes for tyfigupon functions, replacing multiple UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations.
evidence_refs: grep diff.diff: tyfigupon.h changes fn_803152BC, un_803153EC, fn_803155C8, fn_80315C44, fn_8031638C, un_803181BC signatures

key_files.role: Defines/extends ToyAnimState as a real typed structure with documented size and fields.
evidence_refs: grep diff.diff: ToyAnimState comment changed to size 0x14; xC and pad_12 fields added

key_files.role: Uses ToyAnimState instead of local raw byte struct/pointer arithmetic for un_804A2AA8 accesses.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: un_804A2AA8_t removed; data_ptr becomes ToyAnimState* state
diff_excerpt: state->jobj, state->x0E, state->x11, state->x10, state->x0F replace raw offsets

key_files.role: Updates reset code to memzero the typed ToyAnimState object with sizeof.
evidence_refs: grep diff.diff: memzero(un_804A2AA8, 0x14) changed to memzero(&un_804A2AA8, sizeof(ToyAnimState))

key_files.role: Includes ty/types.h and changes un_804A2AA8 extern from u8 array to ToyAnimState.
evidence_refs: grep diff.diff: adds #include "ty/types.h" and extern ToyAnimState un_804A2AA8

key_files.role: Corrects un_803087F4 return type from void to HSD_GObj*.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: toy.h prototype changed to HSD_GObj* un_803087F4(void*)

key_files.role: Expands un_804D6EF4_t from sparse padding to typed fields and a jobjs array used by tyfigupon/toy code.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: un_804D6EF4_t adds x00, unk4, x08, x0C, HSD_JObj* jobjs[16], x58, x5C-x5E

key_files.role: Changes selected tyfigupon .data symbols from global to local scope.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: un_803FEA10, un_803FEB60, un_803FEED4, un_803FEEE8 scope global to local

what_changed: Implemented a large portion of src/melee/ty/tyfigupon.c, replacing multiple placeholder comments/stubs with C bodies for functions such as fn_803152BC, un_803153EC, fn_803155C8, fn_80315C44, fn_8031638C, un_80316420, fn_803168DC, fn_80316C24, un_8031753C, un_80317A60, and un_803181BC.
Recovered tyfigupon.h prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete return/argument types for several functions.
Introduced typed local structures in tyfigupon.c including TyFiguponData, TyFiguponUD, and TyFiguponED4, while retaining some offset-style field names.
Moved ToyAnimState usage into shared ty/types.h and updated toy.c, tylist.c, and tylist.h to access un_804A2AA8 as a ToyAnimState object instead of a raw u8 array.
Expanded struct un_804D6EF4_t in if/types.h to expose a HSD_JObj* jobjs[16] array and state fields used by tyfigupon code.
Added many asset/resource strings and a HSD_CameraDescPerspective object in tyfigupon.c for ToyFigurePon/TyMnFigp/SdToy resources.
Adjusted symbol metadata for four .data symbols in config/GALE01/symbols.txt from global to local scope.
Automated bot report recorded +0.05% matched code, +1804 bytes, and 10 new matches; tyfigupon new matches listed include fn_803152BC, un_803181BC, and fn_8031638C.

smart_moves.text: Converted un_804A2AA8 from raw byte-array style access to a ToyAnimState extern and reused sizeof(ToyAnimState) in reset code.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: toy.c data_ptr becomes ToyAnimState* state
grep diff.diff: tylist.c memzero uses sizeof(ToyAnimState)
grep diff.diff: tylist.h extern ToyAnimState un_804A2AA8

smart_moves.text: Recovered function prototypes in the owning header alongside new function bodies, reducing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS surface.
evidence_refs: grep diff.diff: tyfigupon.h prototype replacements
diff_excerpt: tyfigupon.c adds corresponding function bodies

smart_moves.text: Used existing project abstractions/macros where visible, including GET_JOBJ/GET_TOY, HSD_JObjGetTranslation*, and ABS, rather than leaving all generated-looking pointer/math expansions.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: tyFigupon_80314C5C uses GET_TOY, GET_JOBJ, HSD_JObjGetTranslationX/Z, ABS

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a shared byte buffer's layout becomes clear across multiple files, promote it to a shared typed struct and update externs plus reset code together.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: toy.c replaces raw data_ptr offsets with ToyAnimState fields
grep diff.diff: tylist.h extern changed to ToyAnimState
grep diff.diff: tylist.c memzero uses sizeof(ToyAnimState)

decomp_lessons.lesson: Function body recovery should be paired with header signature recovery when signatures are visible from the implementation.
evidence_refs: grep diff.diff: tyfigupon.h UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS replacements
diff_excerpt: toy.h changes un_803087F4 return type to HSD_GObj*

decomp_lessons.lesson: For matching-heavy code, local comments that identify remaining register-swap/permuter issues are useful handoff notes, but the tactic itself should remain narrow and evidence-bound.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: comment '3-way regswap (r29-r30-r31) to 100%'
diff_excerpt: comment 'TODO: One more regswap for 100%'
human_pr_text: author says leaving it for someone with more patience with permuter

naming_conventions.text: Unproven functions retain address-style names such as fn_803152BC and un_803153EC while signatures are improved.
evidence_refs: grep diff.diff: tyfigupon.h keeps fn_/un_ names while replacing UNK signatures

naming_conventions.text: Recovered structs use subsystem-specific names where evidence is local to tyfigupon/toy, such as TyFiguponData, TyFiguponUD, TyFiguponED4, and ToyAnimState.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: tyfigupon.c typedefs TyFiguponData, TyFiguponUD, TyFiguponED4
grep diff.diff: types.h ToyAnimState

naming_conventions.text: Partially understood fields remain offset-style names such as x5C, x0E, x10, and jobjs, avoiding over-specific semantic guesses.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: if/types.h un_804D6EF4_t fields x58/x5C/x5D/x5E and jobjs[16]
grep diff.diff: ToyAnimState fields xC, x0E, x0F, x10, x11

Tyfigupon entries included fn_803152BC, un_803181BC, fn_8031638C as new 100% matches, plus large improvements for fn_80316C24, fn_803155C8, un_8031753C, fn_80315C44, un_80316420, un_80317D80_OnEnter, un_80317A60, fn_803168DC, fn_80316170, un_803153EC, and tyFigupon_80314C5C.

notes: The raw diff loaded in the prompt is truncated, though targeted grep recovered the smaller header/type hunks.
There were no review comments and no human reviewer rationale in the slice.
Automated bot report provides matching-progress evidence, but the slice does not include local build commands, objdiff logs, or adjacent regression checks.
The bot report lists new matches in gm/gr units that are not in changed_files; those are treated as report context/noise rather than PR-authored file changes.
Static string/data additions and symbol scope changes are visible, but the slice does not include explicit data ownership rationale.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Promote shared raw byte state to a typed struct when cross-file layout is recovered
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2293 replaced raw un_804A2AA8 byte-array access with ToyAnimState in toy.c, tylist.c, tylist.h, and ty/types.h, including sizeof(ToyAnimState) for reset. This is a concrete example of typed-fields-over-pointer-math across a shared state object.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: toy.c ToyAnimState* state
grep diff.diff: tylist.c sizeof(ToyAnimState)
grep diff.diff: tylist.h extern ToyAnimState

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover headers with implementations
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2293 updated tyfigupon.h and toy.h prototypes at the same time that implementation evidence appeared, replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS or incorrect void return types with concrete signatures.
evidence_refs: grep diff.diff: tyfigupon.h signature replacements
diff_excerpt: toy.h HSD_GObj* un_803087F4(void*)

source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact for curator review; do not promote automatically because the PR slice shows strings/usages but not an explicit subsystem description.

source_update_candidates.title: Per-function matching comments for unresolved regswap/permuter issues
source_update_candidates.text: This PR leaves narrow local comments such as '3-way regswap ... to 100%' and 'TODO: One more regswap for 100%' alongside matching-heavy code. Curator may consider whether standards should encourage concise local notes for unresolved matching tactics, while still requiring objdiff evidence for keeping PAD_STACK/pragmas/register-shaping code.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all PAD_STACK, #pragma dont_inline, or regswap shapes are broadly acceptable from this PR; the slice lacks objdiff/adjacent regression logs beyond the automated score report.
Do not promote the static string-literal storage pattern as a general style; the diff shows it happened here, but data ownership rationale is not included.
Do not treat the bot-reported gm/gr matches as changed files in this PR because changed_files metadata lists only config, if/types, and ty files.
